reasoning: Growth should start with direct seller outreach and proof assets; SEO and paid ads are premature until conversion from paid SKU packs is known.
known: Cross-border sellers are reachable through seller communities and direct operator outreach.
Paid alternatives provide SEO vocabulary and pricing anchors.
No landing page or conversion data exists yet.
assumed: Before/after demos will drive more intent than feature copy.
Seller groups will tolerate value-first posts with image rule checklists.
Search demand exists around product image editing and Amazon listing image optimization.
toValidate: Which channel yields the first 10 qualified sellers fastest?
Which demo category converts best: home goods, beauty, electronics, apparel, or food?
Whether China sellers prefer WeChat consultative sales instead of a web landing page.
Whether Amazon-specific copy outperforms broad ecommerce copy.
concerns: Broad platform positioning will dilute message clarity.
AI-generated demo images may be distrusted unless product fidelity is shown clearly.
Communities may view promotional image services as spam without useful checklists.
nextSteps: Create 3 before/after demo packs from non-sensitive sample products.
Write one Amazon main-image checklist lead magnet.
DM 10 sellers with a specific offer: one SKU pack reviewed against Amazon rules.
Track every outreach with UTM or spreadsheet source tags.

marketRouting.reason: First wedge is cross-border Amazon; China seller channels remain a secondary validation track.

titles: Amazon Product Image Pack From One Raw Photo
metaDescriptions: Generate and review Amazon-ready product image sets from one raw product photo.

channels.name: direct seller outreach
channels.hypothesis: Specific SKU image audit offers will outperform generic AI-image pitches.
channels.measurement: qualified calls and paid SKU packs

channels.name: seller communities
channels.hypothesis: A useful image compliance checklist can start conversations without looking like spam.

channels.name: SEO
channels.hypothesis: Long-tail compliance queries can generate later inbound demand.
channels.measurement: Search Console impressions and booked calls

handoffSummary.summary: Operate the first week as a sales/service experiment; success means paid packs and acceptable revision economics, not traffic volume.
